summary.heading: Professional Summary
summary.body: As a proven product leader and people manager, I have a talent for engaging engineers and customers. I quickly tackle complex problems to find effective solutions and excel in communicating with diverse audiences.
experience.heading: Experience
experience.virbela.title: Lead Product Manager
experience.virbela.bullet_1: Led product strategy and roadmap for a virtual 3D workspace platform used by enterprise clients across 40+ countries.
experience.virbela.bullet_2: Partnered with engineering, design, and customer success to deliver bi-weekly releases with measurable retention improvements.
experience.virbela.bullet_3: Drove a 30% reduction in onboarding time by redesigning the first-run user experience based on customer journey mapping.
experience.virbela.bullet_4: Defined and tracked OKRs across three product squads, aligning quarterly goals with company growth targets.
experience.virbela.bullet_5: Conducted over 200 customer interviews to surface pain points, validate hypotheses, and prioritize the backlog.
experience.virbela.bullet_6: Introduced structured discovery sprints that reduced wasted engineering effort by 25% in the first year.
experience.virbela.bullet_7: Collaborated cross-functionally with Sales and Marketing to develop go-to-market plans for three major feature launches.
experience.project44.title: Product Manager
experience.project44.bullet_1: Managed the carrier connectivity product, enabling real-time freight visibility for Fortune 500 shippers.
experience.project44.bullet_2: Worked closely with integration engineering to streamline EDI and API onboarding, reducing carrier activation time by 40%.
experience.omnitracs.role_1.title: SaaS Sr PM – Strategic Initiatives
experience.omnitracs.role_1.bullet_1: Spearheaded a cross-platform initiative to unify three legacy SaaS products onto a single cloud architecture.
experience.omnitracs.role_1.bullet_2: Built business cases and executive presentations that secured $2M in product investment funding.
experience.omnitracs.role_1.bullet_3: Coordinated with engineering leads across four time zones to maintain delivery schedules during organizational restructuring.
experience.omnitracs.role_2.title: SaaS Sr PM – Canadian Market
experience.omnitracs.role_2.bullet_1: Owned the Canadian product roadmap, adapting core fleet management features to meet Canadian ELD mandate requirements.
experience.omnitracs.role_2.bullet_2: Grew Canadian ARR by 18% YoY by identifying and closing product gaps that were causing churn among mid-market accounts.
experience.omnitracs.role_2.bullet_3: Built relationships with key Canadian carrier associations to gather regulatory intelligence and influence product direction.
experience.omnitracs.role_3.title: Product Manager
experience.omnitracs.role_3.bullet_1: Managed the Hours of Service compliance product used by 50,000+ commercial drivers across North America.
experience.omnitracs.role_3.bullet_2: Launched a mobile companion app that achieved a 4.2-star rating within three months of release.
experience.omnitracs.role_3.bullet_3: Authored detailed PRDs and worked closely with QA to ensure zero critical defects at launch for three consecutive releases.
experience.crossmark.role_1.title: Product Owner / Business Analyst
experience.crossmark.role_1.bullet_1: Served as product owner for an internal field merchandising platform used by 3,000+ field reps across the US.
experience.crossmark.role_1.bullet_2: Translated business requirements from retail operations into user stories, acceptance criteria, and sprint-ready backlog items.
experience.crossmark.role_1.bullet_3: Partnered with offshore development teams in an Agile/Scrum environment to deliver quarterly feature releases on schedule.
experience.crossmark.role_2.title: Management Trainee
experience.crossmark.role_2.bullet_1: Completed a rotational management program covering field operations, client services, and business analytics.
experience.crossmark.role_2.bullet_2: Analyzed sales performance data for CPG clients, producing weekly reports that informed territory prioritization decisions.
